title: Internal error when empty block gets logical-not optimized

features.name: empty begin-end block in else branch of if-else
features.description: Code should include an if-else construct where the else branch contains an empty begin...end block with no statements inside
features.snippet: if (cond) begin end else begin end

features.name: negated function call in if condition with empty else
features.description: Code should include an if-else where the condition uses logical negation of a function call (like !$feof(f)), and the else branch is an empty begin...end block
features.snippet: if (!$feof(f)) begin end else begin end

features.name: nested if with feof and empty else block
features.description: Code should include nested if statements where a function call like $feof is negated in a condition, with an empty begin...end block in the else branch
features.snippet: if (a) begin if (!$feof(f)) begin end else begin end end
